acceptance_results.criterion: Acquisition startup bootstrap includes the canonical add_tenant_postback_routing.sql migration.
acceptance_results.reason: defaultAdminManagementSchemaPaths now includes create_postback_tables.sql followed by add_tenant_postback_routing.sql.

acceptance_results.criterion: The bootstrap order preserves the single canonical postback path documented by TMP-045 and does not run subscription-external duplicate postback DDL.
acceptance_results.reason: Only acquisition-api migrations were added; no subscription-external path was introduced.

acceptance_results.criterion: Repository tests assert the migration is included and that the migration adds tenant_id, channel_id, and failure_reason columns required by PostbackRepository.
acceptance_results.reason: Targeted repository tests pass and assert both bootstrap order and tenant-routing migration content.

cleanup_notes: No service process was left running.
No remote database mutation was performed.
No dependency, compose, go.mod, go.sum, or subscription-external file was changed.
completed_work: Created TMP-056 defect slice after reviewing TMP-036/TMP-045 prior postback schema work.
Added acquisition-api postback table and tenant-routing migrations to the service-local startup bootstrap list.
Added repository tests for bootstrap order and tenant-routing migration content.
Recorded domain grounding, slice story/spec, and value-gate evidence.
known_gaps: Live startup against the remote database was not rerun because this slice does not mutate remote databases and prior proof slices recorded missing documented DB credentials.
operator_message: TMP-056 is complete: acquisition-api startup now applies the canonical postback tenant-routing migration before dispatcher polling.
risk_notes: The new bootstrap sequence includes create_postback_tables.sql, whose SQL is already used by compose bootstrap and is idempotent for existing postback tables.
HVC labels TMP-056 for review because of a broadness-signal keyword, but it reports no blocking reasons and the work is bounded to the startup bootstrap defect.
summary: Aligned acquisition-api service-local startup bootstrap with the canonical postback migration path so the in-process dispatcher does not poll tenant-aware postback_outbox columns before they exist.

validation.output_excerpt: No blocking reasons; TMP-056 classified vertical_defect_slice with review-only broadness_signal:complete.
ok true; only known superseded stale ledger warning for TMP-011-repair-1 and TMP-015-repair-1.
